step_rationale: Cardioprotective amino acid; regulates myocardial ischemia-reperfusion and metabolic recovery.
mechanism: Taurine is a conditionally essential amino acid that provides cardioprotection during myocardial ischemia-reperfusion and supports long-term post-MI recovery.

references.title: LC-MS-based metabolomics reveals metabolic changes in short- and long-term administration of Compound Danshen Dripping Pills against acute myocardial infarction in rats.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology

references.title: Modified Taohong Siwu decoction improves cardiac function after myocardial ischaemia and reperfusion in rats by promoting endogenous stem cell mobilization and regulating metabolites.
Metabolomic analysis of serum and myocardium in compensated heart failure after myocardial infarction.
Alterations in the gut microbiome and metabolism with coronary artery disease severity.
